tools.name: acoustic_fembem_cq_refinement_artifact_gate
tools.title: Coupled CQ Refinement Artifact Gate
tools.description: Validates an attach-only shared MATLAB P1 volume-FEM/P1 boundary-BEM Johnson-Nedelec CQ refinement family, including BDF symbol crosscheck, contour alias target, trusted-window refinement, replay determinism, and preserved shared-session state.

summary_json.description: JSON metadata for an already executed shared-session coupled CQ refinement study.
